chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 872 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-09-2023 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** This petition was filed on 19.04.2017 and since then petitioners’ counsel has not pursued this petition, when on the very first date, he was confronted with the question of maintainability of this petition. Today, no one is present on behalf of the petitioners; no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
